title: America's Beginning: A Historical Coloring Adventure
description: This coloring page introduces young learners to key symbols and figures from early American history in a simplified, age-appropriate format.
instructions: Color each part of the picture. Use the color suggestions or choose your own colors. As you color, talk with an adult about what each item represents in American history.

content.image: A simple, child-friendly collage showing the American flag, the Liberty Bell, a simplified Mayflower ship, a bald eagle, and founding fathers in colonial clothing standing together.

elements.name: American Flag
elements.description: Color the stars blue and make stripes red and white

elements.name: Liberty Bell
elements.description: Color this famous bell brown or gold

elements.name: Mayflower Ship
elements.description: Color the ship that brought early settlers to America

elements.name: Bald Eagle
elements.description: America's national bird - color its head white and body brown

elements.name: Founding Fathers
elements.description: Color the clothes of these important people who helped create America

learningFacts: The American flag has 50 stars for 50 states
The Liberty Bell rang to announce the signing of the Declaration of Independence
The Mayflower ship brought the Pilgrims to America in 1620
The bald eagle is America's national symbol
The Founding Fathers helped write important documents for our country
